name: Chocolate x and o Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: www.hersheys.com
1. In a large bowl, beat together the butter, sugar, and vanilla until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs; beat well.
3. Beat in corn syrup. Stir flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt; gradually add to butter mixture, beating until well blended.
4. Cover and refrigerate until dough is firm enough to handle.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F.
6. Shape dough into X and O shapes using a rounded teaspoon of dough.
- For Xs: Place one log on the cookie sheet, press lightly in the center. Place another log on top, forming an X shape.
- For Os: Connect the ends of two logs to form an O shape.
7. Place shaped cookies on an ungreased baking sheet.
8. Bake for 5 minutes or until set.
9. Remove from the cookie sheet and let cool completely.
10. Decorate as desired with icing. Makes about 5 dozen cookies.
